WHEN LaneConf is > 80 %, THE SYSTEM SHALL calculate LaneCurvature within 16 ms.
WHEN LaneConf is < 50 %, THE SYSTEM SHALL set LKA_Status = UNAVAILABLE within 20 ms.
WHEN LateralOffset is > 1.5 m, THE SYSTEM SHALL trigger LKA_Warning = 1 (Left) within 10 ms.
WHEN LateralOffset is < -1.5 m, THE SYSTEM SHALL trigger LKA_Warning = 2 (Right) within 10 ms.
WHEN TLC is < 1.5 s, THE SYSTEM SHALL calculate corrective LKATorqueReq within 10 ms.
WHEN LaneCurvature is > 0.02 1/m, THE SYSTEM SHALL limit max LKATorqueReq to 2.0 Nm within 10 ms.
WHEN Camera Frame is received over Ethernet, THE SYSTEM SHALL decode the payload within [5 ms].
IF Camera Frame drops below 60 FPS (delay > 16.67 ms), THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_CAM_FPS within [20 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_CAM_FPS - transition to safe state.
Safe State: Torque = 0 Nm, LKA OFF, Warning ON

EARS Requirement: WHILE Camera Ethernet link is active, THE SYSTEM SHALL process object detection deadlines within [16 ms].
WHILE LKA is ACTIVE, THE SYSTEM SHALL output LKATorqueReq within limits [-3.0 Nm, 3.0 Nm].
IF requested LKATorqueReq > 3.0 Nm, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL saturate the output LKATorqueReq to 3.0 Nm within [10 ms].
WHILE LKA is ACTIVE, THE SYSTEM SHALL limit the rate of change of LKATorqueReq to [5.0 Nm/s].
IF d(LKATorqueReq)/dt > 5.0 Nm/s, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_TRQ_RATE within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_TRQ_RATE - transition to safe state.
Safe State: Torque = 0 Nm, LKA OFF, Warning ON

EARS Requirement: WHEN DriverTorque > 2.0 Nm, THE SYSTEM SHALL reduce LKATorqueReq by [50 %] within [10 ms].
WHEN DriverTorque > 3.0 Nm, THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to OVERRIDE within [10 ms].
WHERE DriverTorque opposes LKATorqueReq, THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT increase LKATorqueReq magnitude.
WHEN LKA_Status == OFF AND VehSpd > 60 kph, THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to STANDBY within [20 ms].
WHEN LKA_Status == STANDBY AND LaneConf > 80 % AND TurnSignal == 0, THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to ACTIVE within [20 ms].
WHEN LKA_Status == ACTIVE AND LaneConf < 50 %, THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to STANDBY within [20 ms].
WHEN LKA_Status == ACTIVE AND TurnSignal > 0, THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to STANDBY within [20 ms].
WHEN LKA_Status == ACTIVE AND DriverTorque > 3.0 Nm, THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to OVERRIDE within [20 ms].
WHEN LKA_Status == OVERRIDE AND DriverTorque < 1.0 Nm AND LaneConf > 80 %, THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to ACTIVE within [20 ms].
WHEN LKA_Status == ACTIVE AND BrakeStatus == 1, THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to STANDBY within [20 ms].
WHEN LKA_Status == STANDBY AND VehSpd < 55 kph, THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to OFF within [20 ms].
WHEN LKA_Status == ACTIVE AND VehSpd > 150 kph, THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to STANDBY within [20 ms].
IF Any Fault ID is active, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL transition LKA_Status to FAULT within [10 ms].
WHILE LKA_Status == FAULT, THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT transition to STANDBY or ACTIVE until all faults are cleared.
WHILE LKA_Status == OVERRIDE, THE SYSTEM SHALL output LKATorqueReq = 0 Nm.
WHILE LKA_Status == STANDBY, THE SYSTEM SHALL output LKATorqueReq = 0 Nm.
WHEN LKA_Status transitions to OFF, THE SYSTEM SHALL send LKA_Warning = 0 (Off) within [100 ms].
WHILE system is powered ON, THE SYSTEM SHALL execute the control loop every [10 ms] +/- 1 ms.
WHILE system is powered ON, THE SYSTEM SHALL achieve an end-to-end latency (Camera input to LKATorqueReq output) of [<= 50 ms].
WHILE system is powered ON, THE SYSTEM SHALL execute the vehicle signal processing task every [20 ms] +/- 2 ms.
IF Control Loop execution time > 8 ms, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_CPU_OVERLOAD within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_CPU_OVERLOAD - transition to safe state.
Safe State: Torque = 0 Nm, LKA OFF, Warning ON
